title: simalarities between end of eva and the beginning of eva

wikitext:
[]: simalarities between end of eva and the beginning of eva             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Fri Nov 10, 2006 11:20 pm the park in eva, you know that little park where little Shinji builds his sand castle ive seen that same park in so many other parts in eva such as asukas mindfuck eps., Rei III [dc], end of eva, and the some of eps. 5 i think is there some smbolic value to it? Anyway first is the "I'm home..." and "welcome home" part where in EoE Rei said it to lilth as in the start Shinji said it to Misato ok last is Rei appering to Shinji and dissapering in the last minutes of EoE same as the first eps. thats it im going home...

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Nov 11, 2006 5:40 am It is quite common for works of fiction to finish where they started.
